name: FIFA WC26 egress — mitigated (road-side plan)

interventions.plan: Eastbound contraflow on Lake Shore Blvd W (Strachan → Bathurst), 17:00–18:30
Retime Dufferin & Strachan signals — 110 s cycle, egress-biased splits
Close Princes' Blvd to general traffic (pedestrian egress); hold 509/511 transit priority

note: Models contraflow + signal retiming as capacity uplift near the stadium, plus a 30% transit/pedestrian shift off the road OD. Egress congestion eases; zero hard-constraint conflicts.
